morning_brew: Alright, wicked mornin' to ya, Boston! We had a real Patriots' Day barn burner down on Yawkey Way yesterday, huh? The Red Sox pulled out an 8-6 win against the Tigers, and frankly, we needed that one bad. After what's been a tough start, seeing some offense come alive was a sight for sore eyes. Now, we gotta carry that momentum forward, especially with the Pinstripes rollin' into town tonight.

Speaking of offense, Yoshida's still swingin' a hot stick, sittin' pretty with a .324 average and an .889 OPS. That's a heater, kid! But let's be honest, the pitching was a bit of a disastah. Gray only lasted 2.2 innings, and then the bullpen came in and made it a little too interesting. Watson gave up three earned runs in just 1.1 innings. We can't be doin' that in the playoffs, fellas, let alone against the Tigers.

And speaking of playoffs, the Celtics and Bruins are officially in it! The schedule's out, and we've got both teams kickin' off their runs tonight. It's time to buckle up, folks, this is where it really counts. Over in Foxborough, the chatter about A.J. Brown comin' to the Patriots after June 1 is certainly somethin' to keep an eye on. Could be a game-changer if it pans out, but I'll believe it when I see it.

trend_watch.dans_take: This kid is still scorchin' hot at the plate! He's puttin' up numbers and we need more of that if this team is gonna turn it around.

trend_watch.trend: Gave up 3 earned runs on 4 hits in 1.1 innings in the last outing.
trend_watch.dans_take: Are you kiddin' me? Three earned runs in barely an inning? That's not gonna cut it when the games really matter. We gotta tighten that up, pronto.

trend_watch.trend: Pitched only 2.2 innings, giving up 1 earned run on 3 hits and 1 walk.
trend_watch.dans_take: Our starters need to go deeper than that! Two and two-thirds innings is absolutely brutal and puts way too much pressure on the bullpen. Get it together, pal!

news_digest.headline: Red Sox play the Yankees in first of 3-game series
news_digest.dans_take: Here we go, the Yankees are comin' to town tonight, let's see if we can keep that Patriots' Day energy rollin'!

news_digest.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Eastern Conference first-round takeaways
news_digest.dans_take: The playoffs are here, time for the Celtics to show everyone what they're made of in the Eastern Conference!

news_digest.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
news_digest.dans_take: Playoff schedules are set, no more excuses, it's championship or bust for the Celtics!

news_digest.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs 2026: Bracket, schedule, scores, news
news_digest.dans_take: The Stanley Cup playoffs are here, let's get ready for some physical hockey, Bruins, show 'em what Boston's all about!

news_digest.headline: 2026 NBA draft order: Pre-lottery picks for first, second rounds
news_digest.dans_take: Draft talk already? Focus on the playoffs, fellas, that's what really matters right now for the Celtics!

news_digest.headline: Ceddanne Rafaela's tiebreaking two-run single helps Red Sox to 8-6 Patriots' Day win over Tigers
news_digest.dans_take: A Patriots' Day victory, that's what I like to see! Rafaela comin' up clutch, that's Boston baseball, baby!

news_digest.headline: 'It makes no sense!' Stephen A. has no idea what's going on with Eagles
news_digest.dans_take: Stephen A. is as confused as I am, but if A.J. Brown is comin' to Foxborough, I'll take it!

news_digest.headline: Schefter: A.J. Brown likely to be traded to the Patriots post-June 1
news_digest.dans_take: A.J. Brown to the Patriots? Now that would be a wicked good get for the offense, but I'm not holdin' my breath until it's official.
